> Codebase analysis generated by Sourcevision.
> When using this document: group related items together and separate unrelated concerns.

## Project Overview

- **Files**: 740
- **Lines of code**: 240,825

- **Zones**: 15 (15 with descriptions)
- **Git**: feature/integrate-codex @ 21786d2
- **Analyzed**: 2026-02-24T15:08:32.526Z

## Architecture Zones

### Agent Core (`agent-core`)

Main autonomous agent engine handling analysis, lifecycle management, and execution workflows.

- Files: 90
- Cohesion: 0.95, Coupling: 0.05
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/process/index.ts, packages/hench/src/schema/v1.ts, packages/hench/src/tools/exec-shell.ts, packages/hench/src/tools/rex.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/agent-core/context.md`

Specialized validation logic for task completion detection and verification workflows.

- Files: 5
- Cohesion: 0.55, Coupling: 0.45
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/validation/completion.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/completion-validation/context.md`

## Route Structure

### Server API Routes

**/api/hench/adaptive/** (handleAdaptiveRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-adaptive.ts`

```
DELETE  /api/hench/adaptive/override/:key
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/analysis
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/history
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/settings
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/apply
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/dismiss/:id
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/lock/:key
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/override
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/settings
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/unlock/:key
```

**/api/ndx-config** (handleConfigRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-config.ts`

```
GET     /api/ndx-config
GET     /api/projects
POST    /api/projects/switch
```

**/api/features** (handleFeaturesRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-features.ts`

```
GET     /api/features
PUT     /api/features
```

```

POST    /api/hench/execute/:taskId/terminate
POST    /api/hench/runs/:id/mark-stuck
POST    /api/hench/templates
POST    /api/hench/templates/:id/apply

```

### Components: 5 total, 0 usage edges

## Findings

### Anti-patterns

- God function: GraphRenderer.constructor in packages/web/src/viewer/graph/renderer.ts calls 49 unique functions — consider decomposing into smaller, focused functions [warning]
- God function: runConfig in config.js calls 36 unique functions — consider decomposing into smaller, focused functions [warning]

### Relationships

- Tightly coupled modules: packages/web/src/server/routes-rex.ts and packages/web/src/server/types.ts — 129 cross-file calls (unidirectional). Consider extracting shared interface or merging [info]

### Observations

- High cohesion (0.95) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (agent-core)
- Outstanding architectural cohesion across a large codebase with 90 files [info] (agent-core)
- High cohesion (0.96) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (dashboard-ui-foundation)
- Schema validation integrated with UI components enables type-safe data rendering throughout the dashboard [info] (dashboard-ui-foundation)
- Bidirectional coupling: "agent-core" ↔ "tool-system" (5+3 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface [warning]
- Bidirectional coupling: "dashboard-ui-foundation" ↔ "prd-management-interface" (7+3 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface [warning]
- Size imbalance: largest zone has 117 files vs smallest with 5 — uneven decomposition [info]
- Strong overall architecture with one zone requiring cohesion improvements [info]
- Web package's internal zone structure mirrors the overall system architecture with clear separation of infrastructure, foundation, and domain concerns [info]
- Fan-in hotspot: packages/rex/src/core/tree.ts receives calls from 30 files (high fan-in expected for this module type) — high-impact module, changes may have wide ripple effects [info]
- ... and 10 more

### Suggestions

- Hub function: walkTree in packages/rex/src/core/tree.ts is called from 21 files (high fan-in expected for this module type) — changes here have wide impact, consider if responsibilities can be narrowed [info]
- 3 potentially unused exports in packages/web/src/viewer/utils.ts have no incoming calls: getZoneColor, buildFlowEdges, buildFlowNodes [info]
- Potentially unused export: simpleGlobMatch in packages/hench/src/shared/glob.ts has no incoming calls — verify if still needed [info]
